boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: AUTH-ZEN-080 covers site Z-12, protocol P7.2, consent C11, activation date 2026-06-28, and enrollment authority before enrollment.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect; FEAS-ZEN-080 is explicitly not activation authority and does not block AUTH-ZEN-080.

final_answer: AUTH-ZEN-080 supplies the precise activation authority matching all required elements under STD-ZEN-080-P. The action boundary is closed. Clinical operations may activate the trial site.
